name: Peppermint Oil
summary: Decision-ready summary: Peppermint Oil is best framed for IBS abdominal pain; gut spasm; bloating discomfort; safety screen: GERD; hiatal hernia; gallbladder disease; young children.
description: Peppermint oil can relax gastrointestinal smooth muscle and reduce visceral pain signaling, aligning with evidence for IBS symptom reduction and abdominal discomfort.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
